test.command: NOTE: ypricemagic test suite does not reliably run on macOS. Validation happens through ypricemagic-server Docker stack.
test.note: Tests cannot run on macOS - this is a known limitation per services.yaml and AGENTS.md. Collection fails with dank_mids/brownie connectivity error. Validation gate is server Docker stack.

typecheck.note: 1772 pre-existing errors in 91 files. New convex.py errors (6) follow the same patterns as errors in curve_gauge.py (6), erc4626.py (6), exotic_tokens.py (22) - all introduced by the same a_sync/stuck_coro_debugger decorator pattern used throughout the recent milestone work. No regression.

lint.note: All 164 files pass black formatting check.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce rule #8 to make explicit that @stuck_coro_debugger is required on ALL async price-fetching functions including get_price(), not just is_* detection functions. Example: 'This means @stuck_coro_debugger on get_price(), get_underlying_*(), is_*() and any other async function that makes RPC calls.' Pattern: @stuck_coro_debugger belongs on get_price() in convex.py but was omitted.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: convex.py get_price() was added without @stuck_coro_debugger while the corresponding functions in curve_gauge.py and erc4626.py both have it. Workers are applying the decorator to detection functions (is_*) but sometimes missing it on get_price().
